heading: Definitions
label: 16511 Definitions

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “commercial technology” means a technology in general use in the commercial marketplace.

children.heading: Inclusions
children.label: B Inclusions
children.text: The term “commercial technology” does not include a technology solely by use of the technology in a demonstration project funded by the Department.

children.heading: Cost
children.label: 2 Cost
children.text: The term “cost” has the meaning given the term “cost of a loan guarantee” within the meaning of .section 661a(5)(C) of title 2

children.heading: Eligible project
children.label: 3 Eligible project
children.text: The term “eligible project” means a project described in .section 16513 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “guarantee” has the meaning given the term “loan guarantee” in , except that a loan guarantee may guarantee any debt obligation of a non-Federal borrower to any Eligible Lender (as defined in section 609.2 of title 10, Code of Federal Regulations).section 661a of title 2

children.heading: Inclusion
children.label: B Inclusion
children.text: The term “guarantee” includes a loan guarantee commitment (as defined in ).section 661a of title 2

children.heading: Obligation
children.label: 5 Obligation
children.text: The term “obligation” means the loan or other debt obligation that is guaranteed under this section.

children.heading: State
children.label: 6 State
children.text: The term “State” has the meaning given the term in .section 6802 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: to provide financing support or credit enhancements, including loan guarantees and loan loss reserves, for eligible projects; and

children.label: ii
children.text: to create liquid markets for eligible projects, including warehousing and securitization, or take other steps to reduce financial barriers to the deployment of existing and new eligible projects.

children.heading: Inclusion
children.label: B Inclusion
children.text: The term “State energy financing institution” includes an entity or organization established to achieve the purposes described in clauses (i) and (ii) of subparagraph (A) by an Indian Tribal entity or an Alaska Native Corporation.
